channel.title: GitHub Vue Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: hslr-s/sun-panel
item.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

item.title: yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3
item.description: 芋道管理后台，基于 Vue3 + Element Plus 实现，支持 RBAC 动态权限、数据权限、SaaS 多租户、Flowable 工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP 等功能。

item.title: chuzhixin/vue-admin-better
item.description: 🚀🚀🚀vue admin,vue3 admin,vue3.0 admin,vue后台管理,vue-admin,vue3.0-admin,admin,vue-admin,vue-element-admin,ant-design,vue-admin-beautiful-pro,vab admin pro,vab admin plus,vue admin plus,vue admin pro

item.title: PanJiaChen/vue-element-admin
item.description: 🎉 A magical vue admin https://panjiachen.github.io/vue-element-admin

item.title: pulsejet/memories
item.description: Fast, modern and advanced photo management suite. Runs as a Nextcloud app.

item.title: Jazee6/cloudflare-ai-web
item.description: 支持GeminiPro Vision / Cloudflare Workers AI / ChatGPT的融合Web平台

item.title: kailong321200875/vue-element-plus-admin
item.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
item.description: Free anti fingerprint browser, 指纹浏览器, 隐私浏览器, 免费的web3空投专用指纹浏览器

item.title: RikkaApps/websites
item.description: Websites for Rikka apps.

item.title: imsyy/home
item.description: 个人主页，我的个人主页，个人主页源码，主页模板，homepage

item.title: zclzone/vue-naive-admin
item.description: ⚡️基于 Vue3 + Vite + Pinia + Unocss + Naive UI 的轻量级后台管理模板。

item.title: kevin2li/PDF-Guru
item.description: A Multi-purpose PDF file processing tool with a nice UI that supports merge, split, rotate, reorder, delete, scale, crop, watermark, encrypt/decrypt, bookmark, extract, compress, etc.

item.title: pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
item.description: An online presentation application that replicates most of the commonly used features of Microsoft Office PowerPoint, allowing for the editing and presentation of PPT online. It also supports the export of PPT files.

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: galaxy-s10/billd-live
item.description: 基于Vue3 + WebRTC + Node + SRS搭建的直播间

item.title: doocs/md
item.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、色盘取色、多图上传、一键下载文档、自定义 CSS 样式、一键重置等特性

item.title: DataV-Team/DataV
item.description: Vue数据可视化组件库（类似阿里DataV，大屏数据展示），提供SVG的边框及装饰、图表、水位图、飞线图等组件，简单易用，长期更新(React版已发布)

item.title: radix-vue/shadcn-vue
item.description: Vue port of shadcn-ui

item.title: macrozheng/mall-app-web
item.description: mall-app-web是一个电商系统的移动端项目，基于uni-app实现。主要包括首页门户、商品推荐、商品搜索、商品展示、购物车、订单流程、会员中心、客户服务、帮助中心等功能。

item.title: Yin-Hongwei/music-website
item.description: 🎧 Vue + SpringBoot + MyBatis 音乐网站

item.title: DeepSourceCorp/good-first-issue
item.description: Make your first open-source contribution.

item.title: bastienwirtz/homer
item.description: A very simple static homepage for your server.
